segments.text: O God, You have cast us off; You have broken us down; You have been displeased; Oh, restore us again!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have made the earth tremble; You have broken it; Heal its breaches, for it is shaking.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have shown Your people hard things; You have made us drink the wine of confusion.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have given a banner to those who fear You, That it may be displayed because of the truth. Selah
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: That Your beloved may be delivered, Save with Your right hand, and hear me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: God has spoken in His holiness:
I will rejoice; I will divide Shechem And measure out the Valley of Succoth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Gilead is Mine, and Manasseh is Mine; Ephraim also is the helmet for My head; Judah is My lawgiver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Moab is My washpot; Over Edom I will cast My shoe; Philistia, shout in triumph because of Me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Who will bring me to the strong city? Who will lead me to Edom?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Is it not You, O God, who cast us off? And You, O God, who did not go out with our armies?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Give us help from trouble, For the help of man is useless.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Through God we will do valiantly, For it is He who shall tread down our enemies.
segments.speaker: David
